input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.1.3
            TITLE: components and systems that are incorporated into the design as finished items are not

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.1.3: Components and systems that are incorporated into the design as finished items are not
S.4.1.3 Components and systems that are incorporated into the design as finished items are not 
evaluated as a student designed unit, but are assessed on the team’s selection and application 
of that unit.

final_answer: Components and systems that are incorporated into the design as finished items are not evaluated as a student designed unit, but are assessed on the team’s selection and application of that unit.
